gfx942.source: baseline (gfx942 MI300X): empty winners -> D-bucketed heuristic with use_mfma_k32=false (gfx942 has no 16x16x32 bf16 atom; forcing it core-dumps with 'Cannot select intrinsic llvm.amdgcn.mfma.f32.16x16x32.bf16'). xcd_c/xcd_w left null so the kernel's own shape-derived defaults apply. Reproducible baseline BEFORE any per-shape gfx942 tuning. Bench: op_tests/flydsl_tests/bench_jagged_dense_bmm_perf.py --regime both --metric time -test.

gfx950.source: offline autotune (gfx950 MI355X, 2026-06-09): rocprofv3 --kernel-trace device p10, Mi=7680; swept xcd_c in [1, 16, 32, 60, 120, 240], xcd_w in [4, 8], use_mfma_k32=True; correctness cos>0.999 vs torch eager. 4 headline shapes.

B1024D256K256N7680.source: wpe-probe (gfx950 MI355X, 2026-06-10): do_bench cold-L2 uniform, waves_per_eu=1 -> ~2.13ms vs ~2.20ms (all wpe>0 trials beat all baseline trials, ~2.6%), cos=1.0. _wpe_probe via CompilationContext.compile_hints. Occupancy hint on the overhead-bound D256 shape.

B1024D512K512N7680.source: tile-fold (gfx950 MI355X, 2026-06-10): do_bench cold-L2 uniform, 256x256 tile + xcd_c=120 -> 5.82ms vs 5.98ms at 128x128 (-2.7%), cos=1.0. 256x256 needs 128KB epilogue LDS (fits CDNA4 160KB, not CDNA3 64KB). tune_jdbba_tiles.py. SKEW: skew_xcd_c=8 (NOT remap-off) -> 1.23ms vs 1.26 (-1.7%, 5/5 trials); for this large-D512 skew shape the L2-reuse of a modest chunk beats the load-imbalance penalty.

B120D256K256N16384.source: Mi=16384 deployment sweep (gfx950, 2026-06-10, do_bench cold-L2 uniform): 128x128 wpe=1 -> 0.561ms vs 0.565 heuristic. _mi16k_winners.py. cos=1.0.

B1024D256K256N16384.source: Mi=16384 deployment sweep (gfx950, 2026-06-10): 128x128 wpe=1 -> 4.429ms vs 4.445 heuristic. _mi16k_winners.py. cos=1.0.

B1024D512K512N16384.source: Mi=16384 deployment sweep (gfx950, 2026-06-10): 256x256 -> 12.44ms vs 12.85 at 128x128 (-3.2%). 256x256 needs 128KB LDS (CDNA4 only). _mi16k_winners.py. cos=1.0.
